LanguageData.ABY_AshenGripGloves.label: ashen grip gloves
LanguageData.ABY_AshenGripGloves.description: Early abyssal work-gauntlets built from steel knuckle plates, residue-threaded grip pads and crude ember conduits. They were made for forge operators who still need human hands after handling materials that do not want to stay real.
LanguageData.ABY_RiftConduitGloves.label: rift conduit gloves
LanguageData.ABY_RiftConduitGloves.description: Mid-tier conduit gloves that stabilize a weapon, tool or ritual implement through the hands instead of the bench. Violet-red microchannels run across the knuckles, improving precision while quietly teaching the wearer to trust abyssal feedback.
LanguageData.ABY_CrownsealGauntlets.label: crownseal gauntlets
LanguageData.ABY_CrownsealGauntlets.description: Late-line gauntlets folded around a crown-seal lattice. Their plates do not simply reinforce the hand; they authorize contact, grip and recoil as small acts of dominion. Colonists wearing them are no longer merely holding abyssal tools. They are being accepted by them.
